docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JAN-04-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VINCENT ABECENDARIO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUSTIN NELSON IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABECENDARIO, VINCENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NELSON, JUSTIN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $182.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,182.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
